headline: The Number That Could Test Walmart Stock
summary: The retail giant's new ventures are impressive, but a subtle slowdown in its core U.S. business deserves a closer look.

headline: Home Depot (HD): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the last six months, Home Depot’s shares have sunk to $328.82, producing a disappointing 7.9% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 8.4% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: The Retiree Who Chose $65,000 Instead of $120,000 and Ended Up Richer
summary: Two retirees walk into retirement with the same amount of money. One builds a portfolio that pays $120,000 a year but barely grows. The other settles for $65,000 a year and focuses on dividend growth. At first glance, the first retiree appears to have won. Twenty-five years later, the second retiree may have collected more ... The Retiree Who Chose $65,000 Instead of $120,000 and Ended Up Richer

headline: Home Depot Shares to Hit $450 in 2028? Here’s the Math
summary: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) is the largest home improvement retailer in America, and right now it’s stuck in a frustrating holding pattern. CEO Ted Decker told investors after Q1 that “the underlying demand in our business was relatively similar to what we saw throughout fiscal 2025, despite greater consumer uncertainty and housing affordability pressure.” Translation: the ...
